action.reasoning: First iteration: explore data format, verify Pi0 model loading, understand the full pipeline before writing training code. Need to check dataset_info.json, sample HDF5 files, and confirm Pi0 loads offline.

command_output.stdout:
dataset_info.json: {
  "training_data_prepared": true,
  "default_dataset": "vlabench_train",
  "source": "https://huggingface.co/datasets/USC-PSI-Lab/RABench/tree/main/vlabench/train",
  "hf_repo_id": "USC-PSI-Lab/RABench",
  "hf_subdir": "vlabench/train",
  "format": "RABench unified HDF5 episodes converted from LeRobot LIBERO",
  "container_path": "/data/vlabench_train",
  "schema_version": "rabench-vla-unified-v1",
  "file_pattern": "train/task_*/episode_*.hdf5",
  "cleanup_policy": "prepare.py keeps train/, meta/, schema.json, dataset_info.json, and .prepared only; HF cache, README files, git metadata, and stale nested datasets are removed from /data/vlabench_train.",
  "reference_vlabench_eval_tasks": [
    "add_condiment",
    "insert_flower",
    "select_book",
    "select_chemistry_tube",
    "select_drink",
    "select_fruit",
    "select_mahjong",
    "select_painting",
    "select_poker",
    "select_toy"
  ],
  "minimum_training_task_dirs": 40,
  "minimum_training_episodes": 1600,
  "required_episode_datasets": {
    "observation/rgb": {
      "dtype": "uint8",
      "shape": [
        "T",
        2,
        "H",
        "W",
        3
      ],
      "notes": "Two LIBERO camera streams. Read H/W from the file; do not assume the live simulator observation dict has the same image keys."
    },
    "observation/state": {
      "dtype": "float32",
      "shape": [
        "T",
        "D_state"
      ],
      "notes": "Proprioceptive state exported by the data converter."
    },
    "action": {
      "dtype": "float32",
      "shape": [
        "T",
        7
      ],
      "notes": "Demonstration action. The official VLABench Evaluator accepts EE-control policy outputs and converts them to robot qpos internally. If predict.py bypasses that Evaluator and calls env.step(...) directly, it must adapt this 7-D EE convention to the 9-D Franka action spec (7 joints + 2 fingers)."
    },
    "task_index": {
      "dtype": "int64",
      "shape": []
    },
    "instruction": {
      "dtype": "utf8",
      "shape": []
    },
    "source_dataset": {
      "dtype": "utf8",
      "shape": [],
      "notes": "Expected to identify the converted LIBERO source."
    }
  },
  "required_episode_attrs": {
    "fps": "float",
    "view_names_json": "JSON array of two camera/view names",
    "state_dim": 8,
    "action_dim": 7,
    "num_frames": "int"
  },
  "companion_files": {
    "schema": "/data/vlabench_train/schema.json",
    "task_metadata": "/data/vlabench_train/meta/tasks.json",
    "source_metadata": "/data/vlabench_train/meta/dataset_info.json"
  },

}
